title: dolicholus ciliatus
intro: Dolicholus ciliatus, also known as hairy spike dolicholus, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and muscle cramps. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to relax muscles and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome and menstrual cramps. Dolicholus ciliatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
